pros: Large 17.3-inch 144Hz display offers an expansive and smooth canvas for immersive gaming and multitasking.
Substantial 90Wh battery provides excellent endurance for a gaming laptop of this size, outlasting many competitors.
Military-grade MIL-STD-810H durability ensures the chassis can withstand everyday bumps and travel.
Included MUX Switch maximizes gaming performance and minimizes latency.
cons: The display color gamut is limited (~62.5% sRGB), making it less suitable for professional color-critical work.
At 2.6 kg, the laptop is quite heavy and bulky, reducing portability for everyday commuting.
The RTX 3050 GPU with 4GB VRAM may struggle with the newest AAA games at ultra settings.
who: Gamers and students looking for a large-screen desktop replacement with solid entry-level 1080p gaming performance and excellent battery life.
notWho: Frequent travelers who need a lightweight, highly portable machine, or professional creators requiring a color-accurate display.

cons: Integrated Intel Iris Xe graphics restrict it from handling heavy 3D rendering or AAA gaming.
